targets.expr: sum by (status, outcome, uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application=~"$application", environment=~"$environment", outcome!="SUCCESS"}[5m]))
topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (method, uri, le) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application=~"$application", environment=~"$environment"}[5m]))))
